rbaHistory.note: First cut since Nov 2020 — CPI back in 2-3% band
Held; trimmed mean CPI above target
Held; Q1 CPI surprised to upside

news.title: Hint of major changes to super laws
news.snippet: Federal Treasurer Jim Chalmers says the Albanese government will shortly reveal a new approach to a key part of the superannuation system.

news.title: ASX closes up; Viva Energy slumps; oil jumps after Hormuz closure
news.snippet: A sharp rise in oil prices put pressure on energy stocks, which were the biggest weight on the index.

news.title: Woolies said it ‘Price Dropped’ 276 products – but 96% of them cost more
news.snippet: Documents released by the Federal Court show the supermarket giant negotiated to raise prices and then “discount” them at the same time.

news.title: ASX flat despite Middle East crisis, oil price jump
news.snippet: Australian shares barely moved despite oil prices surging 8 per cent, as US-Iran tensions escalated from the seizure of an Iranian vessel.

news.title: Business to pay up for truckie fuel bills
news.snippet: Australia’s largest retailers and supermarket chains will be forced to cough up as truck drivers face spiralling fuel prices as conflict in the Middle East continues.

news.title: Major stock update after Geelong refinery fire
news.snippet: The energy company that owns and operates the Geelong refinery which went up in flames has returned to the ASX after four days of suspended trading.

news.title: Red Metal strikes fertile system in WA Paterson Province
news.snippet: Red Metal Ltd confirmed fertile geology at Pulkarrimarra in WA’s Paterson Province, with drilling hitting key host rocks and leaving multiple copper-gold targets untested.

news.title: True North triggers QLD copper consolidation with strategic JV
news.snippet: True North Copper has moved to consolidate its Qld copper project, offering to buy Renegade Exploration’s stake in the Carpentaria JV, merging two adjacent copper-gold deposits.

news.title: Flights cancelled, routes change as war uncertainty, fuel price grows
news.snippet: Experts say that if there is no end to the war in the Middle East by June, inflation may hit a level where it smashes discretionary leisure and business travel.

news.title: $1.6 billion bet raises huge suspicions
news.snippet: The financial world’s suspicions have been raised after yet another flurry of bets were placed minutes before a major Iran War announcement.

news.title: Key detail in $1000 tax write-off pledge
news.snippet: More than 6.2 million Australians eligible to claim a $1000 tax deduction without receipts will have to wait.

news.title: Blues confirm Hollands has been admitted to hospital after concerning scenes
